title: Two-seed RealMLP with n_ens32 for both seeds
summary: Combine the two confirmed RealMLP variance-reduction signals by using two RealMLP seeds and n_ens=32 for both seeds.
rationale: Both increasing RealMLP internal ensemble size and averaging a second seed improved the root independently. This patch tests whether the two mechanisms are additive when applied to the clean two-seed RealMLP core.
implementation_hint: Start from the parent two-seed RealMLP average code. Keep the same feature pipeline, folds, seeds, validation protocol, and artifacts. Change both RealMLP experts to use n_ens=32, then average their OOF/test probabilities. Do not add CatBoost, XGBoost, LightGBM, stacking, calibration, or new feature engineering.
expected_effect: Improve OOF AUC if internal ensemble variance reduction and inter-seed averaging provide complementary stability.
risk: GPU runtime and memory cost increase, and the larger ensembles may have diminishing returns.
